questions.question: Implement a word count program in Hadoop using MapReduce. What are the main steps involved in the MapReduce process for this task?
Write a Spark word count program using a SparkContext. How does the SparkContext handle the input data and what are the benefits of using Spark for this task?
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of using Spark

questions.question: Compare the performance of a Hadoop-based word count program with a Spark-based word count program. What are the factors that contribute to the performance difference?
questions.hint: Consider the characteristics of Hadoop and Spark
